headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Las Vegas Sands, Lowers Price Target to $64
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Daniel Politzer   maintains Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $68 to $64.
